Video.summary: Pontiac Silverdome hosts Monster Jam one last time before it gets destroyed with bombastic racing action on January 7, 2006.
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Racing

Video.summary: Arena in 30 returns to the Prudential Center in Newark, NJ for round 5.
Video.title: Prudential Center - Newark, NJ

Video.summary: Experience the raw power of the Arena Championship Series West as Monster Jam Replay takes over the Golden One Center in Sacramento, California. Round 4 features high-stakes action starting with JCB Racing, where Armando Castro and El Toro Loco battle through the bracket to defeat Carson Williams in Thunderoarus for the racing title. The excitement continues with the Great Clips Skills Challenge, featuring technical maneuvers and two-wheel stunts. The night reaches its peak during Freestyle, where Blake Granger and Monster Mutt Dalmatian deliver a spectacular performance, including a signature backflip, to sweep the competition. After a fierce battle against top competitors like Matt Cody in Grave Digger, Blake Granger is crowned the BKT Overall Event Champion.
Video.title: Golden One Center - Sacramento, CA

Video.summary: It's time for the 2017 world racing finals. Watch the drivers go head to head and see who wins it all.
Video.title: World Finals XVIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

World Finals XVIII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Video.summary: The Dome in St. Louis is the center of the Monster Jam universe this week. Who will step into the spotlight and take the racing win?

Video.summary: Check out all of the racing action from all three shows at the Gelredome, on September 26–27, 2009.

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into Ford Field with racing and freestyle fun on February 28, 2015.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: Ryan Anderson and Son-Uva Digger are the new series points leaders as Stadium Championship Series West rides into Houston.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Buckle up, hold on tight, and don't miss Monster Jam's freestyle action from Reliant Stadium, on February 5, 2005.

Video.summary: Get ready for Adam Anderson - the new King of the Anderson family dynasty! Join us as we highlight his best freestyles behind the wheel of Grave Digger and Grave Digger: The Legend.
